sentences.english: I met a new friend at the library last week.
She was sitting next to me and reading a comic book.
sentences.korean: 내 옆에 앉아서 만화책을 읽고 있었어요.

sentences.english: I noticed we were reading the same series.
sentences.korean: 같은 시리즈를 읽고 있는 걸 알아챘어요.

sentences.english: We started talking about our favorite characters.
We exchanged phone numbers and now we text every day.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
